name: default
description: Default test prompt set: 10 prompts across 5 categories (2 per category)

prompts.prompt: top-down military tank with visible tracks, hull, and turret
prompts.hint: Should have distinct tracks on each side, a central hull, and a turret with barrel on top
Should have wheels, body, windows, and a low sporty profile

prompts.prompt: pixel art knight with sword and shield
prompts.hint: Should have helmet, armor body, shield on one side, sword on the other

prompts.prompt: wizard with pointed hat and staff
prompts.hint: Should have a tall pointed hat, robes, and a staff with a glowing tip

prompts.prompt: grass ground tile with subtle texture variation
prompts.hint: Should tile seamlessly, use 2-3 shades of green with small detail patches
Should use blues and white highlights to suggest gentle waves

prompts.prompt: wooden crate with metal corner brackets
prompts.hint: Should have wood plank texture, cross beams, and small metal brackets at corners
Should have a rounded lid, dark wood body, gold lock and trim details
Should have an irregular rounded shape with shading to suggest 3D form

prompts.prompt: green leafy tree viewed from above
prompts.hint: Should have a circular canopy with multiple green shades and a small brown trunk visible
